'''Lunis''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Weequay/Legends|Weequay]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] as a [[Jedi General/Legends|General]] in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. Before the war erupted, Master Lunis selected [[Obs Kaj]] as his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]].

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Weequay/Legends|Weequay]] raised outside of the traditions of his home [[Sriluur/Legends|Sriluur]], Lunis was not obsessed with the deity known as the [[Quay]] like many of his people. [[Jedi training/Legends|Educated]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]], Lunis eventually attained the rank of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]]. Selecting the young [[Falleen/Legends|Falleen]] [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|Initiate]] [[Obs Kaj]] as his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]], the pair joined the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] when the Republic went to [[Clone Wars/Legends|war]] with the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]].<ref name="RDV" />

Serving as a [[Jedi General/Legends|General]], Master Lunis was [[Mission to Katanos VII|dispatched]] with his Padawan to investigate rumored illegal [[Cloning/Legends|cloning]] on the planet [[Katanos VII]]. The horrors of the Clone Wars had affected the Master-Padawan pairing, causing Lunis to fear the growing distance developing between them. Before making planetfall, Lunis took Kaj aside and reminded her that he did care about her and hoped that they could reconnect through the Force. Meeting with [[Stiv Kram]] on the planet, Lunis inquired about the rumored cloning facility and was met with denial.<ref name="RDV" />

However, after doing some investigatory work, Kaj discovered a massive cloning facility filled with failed experiments. Through further interrogation of Kram, Master Lunis learned that the citizens of the world built the facility as a means of providing something of value to the Republic but had only been met with failure. Seizing the opportunity, Kram decided to capture the Jedi and turn them over to the Confederacy in order to collect a bounty on all Jedi. As the miners of the world attacked Lunis, the Weequay attempted to form a mental link with his Padawan in order to bolster his reaction. However, Kaj was more disillusioned with the Order after their betrayal by the miners and resisted her master. Alone amidst countless adversaries, Master Lunis was quickly slain by the miners.<ref name="RDV" />
